_comment: Merge these entries into the project's settings.json hooks object. Adjust checkpoint paths and patterns to match the project.

hooks.command: PROJECT_DIR="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; latest=$(ls -t "$PROJECT_DIR"/{{CHECKPOINT_GLOB_PATTERN}} 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$latest" ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"Latest checkpoint: $latest\"}}"; fi

PROJECT_DIR="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; recent=$(find "$PROJECT_DIR" -path '*/checkpoints/*' -mmin -120 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -z "$recent" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage":"No checkpoint written this session. Consider saving progress before ending."}'; fi
